projects.title: AI Image Generator
projects.description: Advanced AI-powered image generation using state-of-the-art models. Generate stunning visuals from text prompts with real-time processing.

projects.title: Advanced AI Chatbot
projects.description: Intelligent conversational AI with natural language understanding. Multi-turn conversations with context awareness and sentiment analysis.

projects.title: Image Classification System
projects.description: Deep learning model for accurate image classification. Supports 1000+ object categories with 95%+ accuracy using CNN architecture.

projects.title: WhatsApp Clone
projects.description: Full-featured real-time chat application with message encryption, user status, and media sharing capabilities. Production-ready WebSocket implementation.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Beautiful weather application with real-time data, 7-day forecast, and interactive maps. Location-based search with geolocation support.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Scalable e-commerce platform with product management, shopping cart, payment gateway integration, and admin dashboard for inventory control.

projects.title: AI Travel Planner Agent
projects.description: Intelligent travel planning agent with real-time recommendations. Autonomous decision-making for itineraries, hotels, flights, and tourism activities.

projects.title: AI Code Assistant Agent
projects.description: Autonomous coding assistant with code analysis, debugging, optimization, and documentation generation. Multi-language support with architecture understanding.

projects.title: AI Media Generator Agent
projects.description: Multi-modal content generation agent creating images, videos, and audio from text descriptions. Autonomous workflow orchestration with quality optimization.

projects.title: Snake Game
projects.description: Classic snake game with modern UI. Includes leaderboard, difficulty levels, power-ups, and smooth animations for nostalgic gaming.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe AI
projects.description: Interactive tic-tac-toe with intelligent AI opponent. Unbeatable minimax algorithm with beautiful UI and game statistics tracking.
